label: Ancient structure scattered thing
description: A thing scattered around an ancient structure perimeter. The element name is the ThingDef defName (the 'thingDef' field); scalar text is the chance per 100 cells.

thingDef.label: Thing def
thingDef.description: ThingDef to scatter around the structure perimeter. Populated from the XML element name by the keyedObjectList loader.

chancePer100Cells.label: Chance per 100 cells
chancePer100Cells.description: Expected number of instances placed per 100 cells of structure area. Populated from XML scalar text by the keyedObjectList loader.
